title: mallotus baillonianus
intro: Mallotus baillonianus is a plant species found in Southeast Asia, commonly known as the "Bengkung tree" or "Kembang semanggi", which belongs to the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant's extracts and leaves are believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Mallotus baillonianus is often combined with other plants or used as a tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
